name: Lochmere Country Club
about: Lochmere Country Club is a championship golf venue located in Tilton, New Hampshire. The facility is family-owned and operated, offering an 18-hole public course designed by Phil Wogan and George Sargent that features dramatic elevation changes and bentgrass greens. Alongside the outdoor course, the club provides year-round practice options through its two About Golf simulators, which are equipped with 3Trak® launch monitor technology and access to 95+ virtual golf courses. The venue also includes a comprehensive practice facility, a pro shop, and an upscale restaurant called Greenside. Lochmere markets itself as New Hampshire's premier public golf experience, emphasizing its championship conditions and strategic layout.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art About Golf simulators with 3Trak® launch monitor technology
Year-round practice and instruction capabilities in a climate-controlled environment
Access to 95+ virtual golf courses for entertainment and game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Upscale dining available at Greenside Restaurant, open to the public year-round with scratch-made cuisine.
Full service bar at Greenside Restaurant.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two state-of-the-art simulators featuring 3Trak® launch monitor technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for use on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, but the venue offers an on-site restaurant and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Lochmere is a family-friendly venue that welcomes golfers of all ages and skill levels.
